# PoopCheck — Complete Reference

> PoopCheck is an AI-powered stool analysis and gut health tracking mobile application with over 80,000 users worldwide. It is available for free on iOS and Android.

## What is PoopCheck?

PoopCheck is a wellness and health tracking app that uses artificial intelligence to analyze stool photos. When a user takes a photo of their stool, the AI engine classifies it using the Bristol Stool Scale (Types 1-7), analyzes color and consistency, and provides personalized gut health insights. It is not a medical device and should not be used for medical diagnosis.

## Core Features

### AI Stool Analysis
PoopCheck's AI engine is trained on over 100,000 stool samples. It provides instant classification of:
- Bristol Stool Scale type (1-7)
- Stool color analysis
- Consistency and shape assessment
- Health indicator screening

### Gut Health Score
A daily personalized metric calculated from stool consistency, bowel movement regularity, comfort level, and lifestyle inputs. The score helps users understand their overall digestive health at a glance and track improvements over time.

### Bristol Stool Scale Classification
Automatic classification using the medically recognized Bristol Stool Scale:
- Type 1: Separate hard lumps (severe constipation)
- Type 2: Lumpy sausage-shaped (mild constipation)
- Type 3: Sausage with cracks (normal)
- Type 4: Smooth and snake-like (ideal)
- Type 5: Soft blobs (slightly loose)
- Type 6: Mushy with ragged edges (mild diarrhea)
- Type 7: Entirely liquid (diarrhea)
Types 3-4 are considered healthy.

### AI Health Assistant (SOFTie)
A contextual AI chat assistant that answers questions about analysis results, provides advice based on scan history, and streams responses in real-time.

### Health Reports
Comprehensive digestive health reports with trends, patterns, and recommendations that can be exported as PDFs and shared with healthcare providers.

### Community
A global community of 80,000+ users with public post sharing, leaderboard system, and notification features. User data remains private unless explicitly shared.

## Pricing

PoopCheck is free to download and use. Core features including AI stool analysis, Bristol Scale classification, and basic tracking are completely free.

Premium subscription ($4.99/month or $29.99/year) includes:
- Personalized health reports
- AI digestive assistant (SOFTie)
- Advanced analytics and trends
- Export detailed reports
- 2x reward points
- Premium member badge

## Privacy

PoopCheck is built privacy-first. Photos are encrypted in transit and at rest. Data is never sold to third parties. Users can delete their account and all associated data at any time.

## Availability

- iOS: Available on the Apple App Store
- Android: Available on Google Play Store
- Website: https://poopcheck.app
